title: Baked Pecorino Gratin
description: A rich and creamy Italian-inspired side dish featuring a blend of pecorino cheese and gooey gratin.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the pecorino cheese, gooey cheese, and American cheese.
In a separate saucepan, make a mustardy cheese sauce by melting the butter over low heat and whisking in the grated mustardy cheese.
Pour the cheese sauce over the cheese mixture and stir until well combined.
Spoon the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with the shredded gratin.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
Garnish with chopped parsley, if desired.
